zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard de Windsor於1395年4月30日出生在英國米德萊可斯坦維爾時，他的父親Brian de Windsor23歲，母親Alice Drewe20歲。他於大約1409年與Lady Christian Faulkner在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1428年4月16日在他的家鄉享年32歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard de Windsor于1395年4月30日出生在英国米德萊可斯坦維爾时，他的父亲Brian de Windsor23岁，母亲Alice Drewe20岁。他于大约1409年与Lady Christian Faulkner在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1428年4月16日在他的家乡享年32岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Windsor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Windsor (Berkshire), Windsor in Stratford upon Avon (Warwickshire), Winsor in Copythorne (Hampshire), Winsor in Yealmpton (Devon), or Broadwindsor and Little Windsor (Dorset). All these places have the same linguistic origin, whose meaning is controversial, but seems to be ‘windlass bank’ (Old English windels + ōra).

in Yorkshire perhaps a habitational name from Winds Over in Middleton (near Ilkley, Yorkshire). The placename probably derives from Old English wind ‘wind’ (genitive windes) + ofer ‘slope, hill, ridge’.

variants.name: Winzer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gerhard, Ilse, Ingo, Wilhelm.
German: occupational name for a vine-grower or vintner, Middle High German winzer.
German: habitational name from any of various places so named in Bavaria.

variants.name: Winsor
meanings: English: variant of   Windsor  . This is the spelling used for places so named in Devon and Hampshire.
Perhaps also an Americanized form of German   Winzer  .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard de Windsor was born on 30 April 1395, in Stanwell, Middlesex, England, his father, Brian de Windsor, was 23 and his mother, Alice Drewe, was 20. He married Lady Christian Faulkner about 1409, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 16 April 1428, in his hometown, at the age of 32.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard de Windsor est né le 30 avril 1395, à Stanwell, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, Brian de Windsor, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Alice Drewe, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Lady Christian Faulkner environ 1409, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 16 avril 1428, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 32 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard de Windsor am 30. April 1395 in Stanwell, Middlesex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Brian de Windsor 23 und seine Mutter Alice Drewe 20. Er hat um 1409 in England Lady Christian Faulkner geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 16. April 1428 im Alter von 32 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Windsor è nato il il 30 aprile 1395 nel Stanwell, Middlesex, England, il suo padre, Brian de Windsor, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Alice Drewe, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Lady Christian Faulkner circa 1409, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 16 aprile 1428, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 32 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Windsorが1395年4月30日にイギリスミッドレセックススタンウエルで生まれた時，父Brian de Windsorは23歳，母Alice Dreweは20歳であった。約1409年にイギリスでLady Christian Faulknerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1428年4月16日に故郷で32歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Windsor(이)가 1395년 4월 30일 영국 미들레세스 스탠웰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Brian de Windsor(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Drewe(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1409년 영국에서 Lady Christian Faulkner(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1428년 4월 16일 그의 고향에서 32세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Windsor nasceu em 30 de abril de 1395, em Stanwell, Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Brian de Windsor, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Alice Drewe, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Christian Faulkner aproximadamente 1409, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 16 de abril de 1428, em sua cidade natal, com 32 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard de Windsor родился 30 апреля 1395 г. в местности станвелл, миддлесекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Brian de Windsor было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Drewe, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Christian Faulkner около 1409 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 16 апреля 1428 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 32 лет.

Se casó con Lady Christian Faulkner aproximadamente 1409, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 16 de abril de 1428, en su pueblo, a la edad de 32 años.
